suites.title: WatchTowerPlan Validation Baseline
suites.description: Reusable-core validation suite for the current repository's pack contract, front matter, document semantics, and representative schema-backed artifacts.

steps.title: Validate pack contract
steps.description: Ensure the default pack settings surface and its declared validation surfaces load successfully.

steps.title: Validate governed front matter
steps.description: Validate one representative governed Markdown front matter target.

steps.title: Validate governed document semantics
steps.description: Validate one representative governed Markdown semantic target.

steps.title: Validate governed JSON artifacts
steps.description: Validate representative schema-backed governed JSON artifacts.

suites.notes: Acceptance reconciliation remains a separate validation surface and is not part of the reusable-core suite step kinds in this baseline. Repo-wide aggregate validation continues to use repo-local orchestration until the baseline migration lands.
